qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_periodo as oi_periodo, t0.c_periodo as c_periodo, t0.d_periodo as d_periodo, t0.f_desde as f_desde, t0.f_hasta as f_hasta, SEC.policy, t0.c_periodo as CODE, t0.d_periodo as TEXT FROM CYD11_PERIODOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Periodos.PERIODO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_periodo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_periodo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_periodo as oi_periodo, SEC.policy FROM CYD11_PERIODOS as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Periodos.PERIODO\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_periodo LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_periodo asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Periodos.PERIODO.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Capacitacion.Periodos.PERIODO.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(CYD11_PERIODOS.oi_periodo) as CNT from CYD11_PERIODOS Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and CYD11_PERIODOS.oi_periodo={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(CYD11_PERIODOS.d_periodo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(CYD11_PERIODOS.c_periodo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS0
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT ORG01_TIPOS_UNI.d_tipo_uni_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.d_unidad_org, CYD10_PRESUPUESTOS.n_presupuesto FROM ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS, ORG01_UNI_ORG, ORG01_TIPOS_UNI, CYD10_PRESUPUESTOS JOIN ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_unidad_org INNER ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_unidad_org, ORG01_UNI_ORG.oi_tipo_uni_org INNER ORG01_TIPOS_UNI.oi_tipo_uni_org, CYD10_PRESUPUESTOS.oi_estructura RIGHT OUTER ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura WHERE ORG02_ESTRUCTURAS.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} AND CYD10_PRESUPUESTOS.oi_periodo = {#SOURCE:@oi_periodo} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_estructura AS oi_estructura, CYD02_ESTRUCT_DICT.oi_estructura AS oi_estructura_dest, CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.d_dictado, CYD02_DICTADOS.f_inicio, CYD02_DICTADOS.f_fin, CYD02_ESTRUCT_DICT.n_porcentaje FROM CYD02_DICTADOS, CYD02_ESTRUCT_DICT JOIN CYD02_DICTADOS.oi_dictado INNER CYD02_ESTRUCT_DICT.oi_dictado WHERE CYD02_ESTRUCT_DICT.oi_estructura = {#SOURCE:@oi_estructura} AND CYD02_DICTADOS.f_inicio < {DateTime(#source:@f_fin)} AND CYD02_DICTADOS.f_fin > {DateTime(#source:@f_inicio)} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS2
RS3
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT SUM (CYD02_CTOS_DICTADO.n_costo_total) AS n_costo FROM CYD02_CTOS_DICTADO WHERE CYD02_CTOS_DICTADO.oi_dictado = {#SOURCE:@oi_dictado} ')/ROWS/ROW
